name: @azure-tools/typespec-zig
description: TypeSpec emitter that produces a JSON code model for the Azure SDK for Zig code generator (used as a WASI component via jco).

scripts.build: npm run bundle && jco componentize dist/bundled.js --wit wit/component.wit --world-name codegen --out tcgc.wasm
scripts.build:stub: jco componentize src/stub.js --wit wit/component.wit --world-name codegen --out tcgc-stub.wasm
